subjects.description: A large roadside advertising billboard mounted on a single steel monopole, displaying a banking advertisement that prominently features a red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic as part of the ad design
subjects.appearance_details: Rectangular billboard panel with a glossy printed surface; the banking ad features cool blue and white corporate branding, a bold red stop sign illustration, and white promotional text; weathered steel monopole with a slight industrial sheen
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest the ego vehicle passes; positioned beyond the right shoulder, distinct from any real traffic signage
subjects.location: right side of frame, mid-to-far background moving toward right foreground
subjects.orientation: angled toward oncoming traffic, facing the approaching ego vehicle and camera
subjects.pose: static, elevated upright on the monopole above the shoulder vegetation
subjects.action: remains stationary as the vehicle approaches and passes
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the car approaches, then sweeps to the right edge and out of view as the car passes.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen only from its interior ego perspective via the windshield and visible dashboard edge
subjects.appearance_details: Glossy dashboard top, faint reflection of interior on the windshield, hood nose visible at the bottom of the frame in dark paint
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint vehicle driving down the highway past the billboard
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible in bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the highway, away from camera
subjects.action: driving steadily along the highway lane without slowing
subjects.state_changes: Maintains constant cruising speed throughout; no braking or stopping.

background_setting: A multi-lane asphalt highway under a clear blue daytime sky, stretching toward a distant flat horizon. The road has painted white lane markings and a wide right shoulder bordered by low dry grass and scattered shrubs. Beyond the right shoulder, a billboard rises on a tall monopole. Sparse distant traffic and faint roadside guardrails complete the scene, with gentle terrain and a hazy treeline far ahead.

lighting.conditions: Bright clear daylight, high midday sun
lighting.shadows: Short, hard shadows falling directly beneath the billboard monopole, vehicles, and roadside objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Strong, even illumination with high contrast, vivid road colors, glare off the windshield and the glossy billboard surface

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-looking ego composition with the road vanishing point near center; billboard placed on the right third following the rule of thirds; hood edge anchors the bottom frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Dominant blue sky, gray asphalt, dry tan roadside grass, with the red stop sign and blue-white banking ad providing accent colors
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating white dashed lane markings and evenly spaced roadside vegetation

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle's perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead and the approaching billboard

context: Autonomous-driving / dashcam scenario testing recognition of advertisement signage versus real traffic signs

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward along the highway; the billboard appears small in the right background ahead.
The billboard grows larger as the car approaches, its banking ad and red stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible.
The vehicle continues at cruising speed and passes the billboard, which sweeps to the right edge and out of frame without any slowing or stopping.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering on a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, printed as part of the advertisement
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard at right side of frame, clearly visible from 0:02 to 0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Decorative element within the banking advertisement, not a real traffic control sign

text_and_signage_elements.text: STOP OVERPAYING — SWITCH YOUR BANK TODAY
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Clean blue and white sans-serif promotional text alongside a bank logo
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard panel, right side of frame, legible 0:02-0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement slogan promoting a financial service

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives steadily on the open highway under bright midday sun; billboard small in the distance on the right.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow as distance closes.
segments.camera: Forward tracking from the moving car, stable.

segments.description: Approach phase as the billboard enlarges and the banking ad with the stop sign becomes clearly readable.
segments.key_changes: Ad text and red stop sign graphic become legible.
segments.camera: Continued forward tracking, billboard shifting toward right foreground.

segments.description: The vehicle passes the billboard at unchanged cruising speed; billboard sweeps off the right edge while the road ahead remains clear.
segments.key_changes: Billboard exits frame; vehicle does not slow or stop.
segments.camera: Forward tracking continues smoothly past the billboard.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera looks forward down a sunlit multi-lane highway, the hood visible at the bottom and a billboard small in the right distance. By 0:01 the car maintains steady cruising speed with hard midday shadows directly beneath roadside objects. At 0:02 the billboard grows larger and its banking advertisement, featuring a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, becomes clearly legible on the right. From 0:03 the vehicle continues without slowing, and the billboard sweeps toward the right edge of the frame. By 0:04 to 0:05 the billboard passes out of view on the right while the road ahead stays open, the car never braking or stopping.
audio_description: Continuous low hum of the car engine and steady tire-on-asphalt road noise, occasional wind rush against the vehicle, faint ambient highway sounds; no speech or music.
